log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Khenra — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Khenra — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Khenra — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Khenra — Iron Concentration HP: 48/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Khenra — Iron Concentration HP: 29/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Khenra — Iron Concentration --- HP: 29/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Khenra — Iron Concentration --- HP: 29/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 15] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 173/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 173/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Khenra — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Khenra — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Khenra — Iron Concentration HP: 15/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):17+8=25 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Khenra — Iron Concentration HP: 1/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):11+8=19 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Khenra — Iron Concentration --- HP: 1/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (1/67). Going invisible for survival.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Khenra — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 173/178 | AC: 18
